chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1726 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA-15358/2016 3. For katcha peshi. 30.11.2016. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w SIP Sohail Sarwar o/b of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Imdad Ali o/b of SHO Seri Hyderabad. = Mr. Ghulam Abbas, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Ghulamullah Chang, Advocate for petitioner, who was also not present on first date and notices were issued to the respondents. Today, the parawise comments have been filed by the police officials/respondents, wherein they have stated that FIR earlier lodged on the request of petitioner is now being disposed of under “C” Class. It has been further stated in the parawise comments that earlier Mst. Lal Pari daughter of present petitioner had herself filed C.P. No.S-2280/2016 before this Court and stated that she has contracted a freewill marriage and Muharram Rind has neither abducted nor detained her. In view of the matter, this petition is disposed of with the directions that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioner and the police officials will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law, if the petitioner approaches them with such a request. JUDGE Shahid
